items.title: Press Briefing: World Economic Outlook, Spring Meetings 2026 — IMF
items.author: www.imf.org
items.snippet: Global financial markets in April 2026 are navigating a complex environment shaped by geopolitical tension, tariff uncertainty, and diverging regional growth. The IMF's April 2026 World Economic Outlook projects global growth at 3.1% for 2026, warning that risks are decisively to the downside. A Middle East conflict has pushed commodity prices higher, firmed inflation expectations, and tightened financial conditions globally. European natural gas (Dutch TTF) surged 70% in March 2026 to multi-yea

items.author: www.federalreserve.gov
items.snippet: US equity markets showed resilience in mid-April 2026, with the Dow Jones gaining approximately 869 points (1.79%) in recent sessions, led by Sherwin-Williams, Home Depot, and Merck. A key catalyst was easing geopolitical tension after Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian commercial vessels, which caused crude oil prices to fall and reduced stagflation fears. items.title: War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities
items.author: www.imf.org
items.snippet: Global markets in mid-to-late April 2026 are navigating a complex backdrop defined by geopolitical de-escalation and persistent trade policy uncertainty. U.S. equities surged to record highs, with the S&P 500 closing above 7,000 for the first time and the Nasdaq posting its 12th consecutive positive session — its longest winning streak since 2009 — buoyed by hopes that tensions in the Middle East (Iran-Israel conflict) are easing and oil flows through the Persian Gulf will normalize. items.title: Tradeweb and Kalshi Announce Strategic Partnership to Expand Institutional Access to Prediction Markets
items.author: www.tradeweb.com
items.snippet:
Alpaca Markets has been active with API enhancements heading into 2026, building on a strong 2025 that included multi-leg options, 24/5 trading, Fully-Paid Securities Lending (FPSL), Fixed Income access, and the launch of an Alpaca MCP Server for AI agent integration. Commission-free Options for the Trading API is slated as an upcoming release, and the platform continues expanding globally with increased brokerage infrastructure partnerships.

items.author: www.bloomberg.com
items.snippet: Global markets in mid-April 2026 are being shaped by a confluence of geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic pressures. The IMF's April 2026 World Economic Outlook projects global growth slowing to 3.1% in 2026 and 3.2% in 2027, with the global economy operating 'in the shadow of war' as Middle East conflict drives rising commodity prices, firmer inflation expectations, and tighter financial conditions. items.title: Arbitrage Bots Dominate Polymarket With Millions in Profits as Humans Fall Behind
items.author: finance.yahoo.com
items.snippet: Automated and algorithmic trading strategies for prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket have matured significantly by 2026. On Kalshi, developers have built AI-powered trading bots using its REST API and FIX connectivity, implementing strategies such as probability mismatch detection (finding mispriced events vs. true probability), cross-platform arbitrage (Kalshi vs. Polymarket vs. PredictIt), and signal-based trading using external data feeds like polls, weather, and economic indicators

items.title: GitHub - octavi42/prediction-market-maker: Market-making strategy that placed #2 in Paradigm's Prediction Market Challenge
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: GitHub hosts numerous market making strategy implementations spanning classical quant models and modern reinforcement learning approaches. The most academically grounded implementations follow the Avellaneda-Stoikov framework, which computes a reservation price adjusted for inventory risk and places asymmetric bid/ask quotes accordingly. Notable examples include mmssss/hft-market-making (Stoikov strategy with HFT backtesting on Binance Perpetual Futures data) and rodlaf/KalshiMarketMaker (Avella

items.title: QTMRL: An Agent for Quantitative Trading Decision-Making - arXiv
items.author: arxiv.org
items.snippet: Recent research from arXiv and SSRN reveals a strong trend toward hybrid and reinforcement learning (RL) approaches in algorithmic trading. Papers from 2025-2026 show increasing integration of multiple AI paradigms: classical technical analysis combined with LLMs for sentiment filtering, deep RL for portfolio optimization, and quantum-enhanced models achieving competitive risk-adjusted returns. A notable 2026 arXiv paper on hybrid AI-driven trading systems integrates technical analysis, statisti

items.title: QTMRL: An Agent for Quantitative Trading Based on Multi-Indicator Guided RL (arXiv 2508.20467)
items.author: arxiv.org
items.snippet: Recent research on reinforcement learning (RL) trading agents spans both theoretical frameworks and practical implementations. On the academic side, a 2025 arXiv paper (2511.12120) proposes a deep RL ensemble strategy for automated stock trading, combining three actor-critic algorithms—PPO, A2C, and DDPG—to build robust trading policies. The QTMRL framework (arxiv 2508.20467) introduces a multi-indicator guided RL agent for quantitative trading that blends technical indicators with adaptive RL f

items.title: Synergizing Quantitative Finance Models and Market Microstructure Analysis — ScienceDirect
items.author: www.sciencedirect.com
items.snippet: Reddit's r/algotrading and r/quant communities in 2025-2026 consistently highlight that maintaining a live trading edge is increasingly difficult due to accelerating alpha decay. Industry practitioners note that strategies which previously ran profitably for six months now erode in roughly two months, as more quant firms crowd similar statistical arbitrage and equity market-neutral approaches. Live competition results from events like the Quantiacs Q22 competition in 2025 showed Sharpe Ratio dec
